positive: Stylized minimalist illustration of a cheerful, majestic Bengal tiger in a dynamic, playful pounce silhouette, surrounded by geometric floral patterns and abstract jungle foliage elements. The color palette should be limited to rich burnt orange, deep forest green, ivory white, and touches of gold leaf accent. Strong, high-contrast composition with the tiger centered and leaping diagonally. Flat design aesthetic meets neo-traditional tattoo style. Perfect for screen printing on apparel. Seamless pattern elements are encouraged.
negative: blurry, photorealism, painting, digital painting, messy, noise, low detail, artifacts, watermark, text, signature, logo, trademark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, muted colors
